OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_NAME.description: The name of the connector instance.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: Comma-separated list of entity types the connector will enrich.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable or disable auto-enrichment of observables.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_ANALYZE_URL.description: ReversingLabs Spectra Analyze appliance API base URL.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_ANALYZE_TOKEN.description: API authentication token for Spectra Analyze.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_ANALYZE_MAX_TLP.description: Maximum TLP level for entities that the connector can enrich.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_ANALYZE_SANDBOX_OS.description: The sandbox operating system platform to execute samples on.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_ANALYZE_CLOUD_ANAL.description: Enable cloud analysis for submitted samples.
